report.summary: F&G volatile 9-29 range (source-dependent) — BTC flat ~$66,911. Since v11: 3 agents ran — Publish promoted 5 tool pages to 717 total, Community drafted tweets #520-524 + newsletter v57 + 2 SVG cards, EOD confirmed 1,251 page.tsx files with 530 unpublished. Production still FROZEN at e3f63fc — 44th escalation.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA v11 → v12: 3 agents ran since last standup — Publish (12:19), Community v3 (12:50), EOD v5 (12:56). No build or design cycle this window.
PUBLISH (12:19): Promoted 5 tool pages from orphan pool — bridge-aggregator-v2, bridge-monitor, chain-comparison, market-dominance, market-recap. Published slug total now 717 (+4 net from v11's 713).

COMMUNITY v3 (12:50): Drafted 5 tweets (#520-524) covering Chainlink $165M unlock, Leap Wallet May 28 shutdown, F&G recovery signal, Russia crypto wallet law, weekend market snapshot. Newsletter v57 themed 'Chainlink Dumps $165M, Leap Wallet Dies & Fear Starts to Thaw'. Created 2 social card SVGs (chainlink-unlock, leap-wallet-sunset).

EOD v5 (12:56): Full codebase audit confirmed 1,251 page.tsx files vs 717 published slugs = 530 pages built but not promoted. 111 phantom published slugs (missing page.tsx → 404s). 101 TS errors across 3 files (non-blocking). All 6 API routes have proper cache/fallback architecture.

MARKET: BTC ~$66,911 (+0.48% 24h). Crypto market cap $2.38T. BTC dominance 56.1%. F&G data conflicting across sources — Alternative.me shows 29 (Fear), CoinGabbar reported 9 (Extreme Fear) on Apr 3, SpotedCrypto cites 12. Likely rapid intraday swings between 9-29 range. Overall sentiment: deeply fearful.
MACRO: Total trading volume $61B. Stablecoin supply $316B ATH. April token unlocks >$600M (ARB, APT, OP, SUI, LINK). Leap Wallet sunset May 28 (54 days).
EGRESS: Sandbox blocks CoinGecko, GSC, Vercel Analytics. Market data confirmed via web search.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE OUTPUT: 3 agents since v11. Publish added 5 tool pages (717 total). Community drafted full content batch (5 tweets, newsletter, 2 SVGs, Discord announcement). EOD ran full code audit.
TODAY'S TOTAL: 51 agent runs (standup×12, build×10, community×11, design×8, eod×8, publish×3 — counts include this standup). Estimated ~$4,470 human-equivalent cost.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (44th ESCALATION): Production frozen at e3f63fc since Apr 2. Now 139+ uncommitted files. EOD v5 confirmed 530 built pages sitting unpublished. The content gap is widening every cycle — 24 learn guides + 130 staging pages cannot capture search traffic. F&G in extreme fear zone means 'how to buy the dip' / 'DCA strategy' / 'crypto passive income' queries spiking. Deploy cost: $0. Deploy ROI: compounds daily.

P1 — CONTENT PIPELINE HEALTHY: Community v3 produced a full content batch (tweets #520-524, newsletter v57, 2 SVG cards). 544 total tweets drafted, 61 newsletter editions. Content authority building — needs deploy to capitalize.

P2 — PUBLISHING VELOCITY: 717 published slugs, but 111 are phantom (missing page.tsx). Real published pages ≈ 606. Orphan pool down to ~624. Publish continues to clear orphans but SEO quality gap persists (older orphans lack JSON-LD and meta tags).
P3 — TECHNICAL DEBT (unchanged): 101 TS errors in 3 files. 111 phantom slugs. 0/6 API routes rate-limited beyond /health. jupiter-dex-aggregator use-client/metadata bug. 4 tool pages carry-over.
BLOCKERS: Deploy authorization remains sole blocker. All other work accumulates in staging.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0, 44th ESCALATION): 530 built pages invisible to Google. Extreme fear sentiment is peak search opportunity for DCA, passive income, and fear & greed content. Every hour without deploy = lost compounding index time. This is now the single highest-ROI action available to the project.

PRIORITY 2 — QUEUE NEW BUILD CYCLE: Last build was v12 (Jito MEV/LST + Mantle guides). Queue next build targeting fear-market content: 'best crypto to buy during extreme fear', 'dollar cost averaging guide 2026', 'crypto bear market survival guide'. These keywords spike 200-400% during sustained sub-20 F&G readings.

PRIORITY 3 — PUBLISH QUALITY TRIAGE: Shift publishing strategy from orphan pool scraps to recent build-cycle pages. Recent pages (Jito, Mantle, Passive Income, Linea) have full SEO markup; orphan pool pages (0/5 JSON-LD in last batch) dilute indexing quality. Scaffold monad + zora to clear queue blockers, then batch-refill with high-quality pages.
